patch.value: SDK.md PM_PACKAGE_RESOURCE_KINDS drift: assets/prompts kinds missing

src/core/packages/manifest.ts:8-14 exports PM_PACKAGE_RESOURCE_KINDS = [extensions, docs, examples, assets, prompts] (assets/prompts shipped in PR#150, pm-z9ho). Drift: docs/SDK.md:53 documents only (extensions, docs, examples), and docs/SDK.md:159 says 'Additional package resource kinds (docs, examples)' omitting assets/prompts. docs/EXTENSIONS.md:87 already documents pm.assets/pm.prompts correctly — align SDK.md with it.

value.note: Align package resource kind documentation with manifest assets/prompts support

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Implementation evidence: docs/SDK.md now lists PM_PACKAGE_RESOURCE_KINDS as extensions, docs, examples, assets, prompts; metadata-first package install text and assertPackageManifest example now include assets/prompts. Verified through pnpm build, pnpm quality:static, pnpm changelog:pm:check, and full coverage 100/100/100/100 in the combined branch.

patch.value: Closed with SDK resource-kind docs aligned to manifest support for assets and prompts; verified in the combined build/static/changelog/coverage gate.
Aligned SDK resource-kind documentation with package manifest support for assets and prompts.
SDK.md documents all manifest package resource kinds consistently with the runtime manifest contract.
SDK.md lists extensions, docs, examples, assets, and prompts in the resource-kind export, metadata-first install text, and assertPackageManifest example.
